Package global.thalion.ttio.genomics

Record Class AlignedRead

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
global.thalion.ttio.genomics.AlignedRead
Record Components:
readName - Read identifier (e.g. "read_000042").
chromosome - Reference sequence name (e.g. "chr1").
position - 0-based mapping position.
mappingQuality - Phred-scaled mapping quality (0–93 typical, max 255).
cigar - CIGAR string (e.g. "150M").
sequence - Base sequence in ACGTN ASCII.
qualities - Phred quality scores as raw bytes.
flags - SAM flags (UINT32 on disk; ints fit signed range).
mateChromosome - "" if unpaired.
matePosition - -1 if unpaired.
templateLength - 0 if unpaired.
public record AlignedRead(String readName, String chromosome, long position, int mappingQuality, String cigar, String sequence, byte[] qualities, int flags, String mateChromosome, long matePosition, int templateLength) extends Record
One aligned sequencing read — the genomic analogue of MassSpectrum.

Immutable value record materialised by GenomicRun.readAt(int) from the signal channels under /study/genomic_runs/<name>/signal_channels/. No HDF5 I/O on this class directly.

Flag bits follow SAM convention: 0x1 = paired, 0x4 = unmapped, 0x10 = reverse-strand, 0x100 = secondary alignment, 0x800 = supplementary alignment. Java's signed byte is sign-extended on read; callers should mask with & 0xFF when interpreting raw base ASCII or quality scores. The record's qualities field is byte[] for compatibility with HDF5 UINT8 reads.

API status: Stable (v0.11 M82.3).

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIOAlignedRead, Python ttio.aligned_read.AlignedRead.

    boolean
    isMapped()
    SAM flag 0x4: read failed to map.
    boolean
    isPaired()
    SAM flag 0x1: read is part of a pair.
    boolean
    isReverse()
    SAM flag 0x10: read is reverse-complemented relative to reference.
    boolean
    isSecondary()
    SAM flag 0x100: secondary alignment (multi-mapping).
    boolean
    isSupplementary()
    SAM flag 0x800: supplementary alignment (chimeric).

  • Constructor Details

    • AlignedRead

      public AlignedRead(String readName, String chromosome, long position, int mappingQuality, String cigar, String sequence, byte[] qualities, int flags, String mateChromosome, long matePosition, int templateLength)
      Creates an instance of a AlignedRead record class.
      Parameters:
      readName - the value for the readName record component
      chromosome - the value for the chromosome record component
      position - the value for the position record component
      mappingQuality - the value for the mappingQuality record component
      cigar - the value for the cigar record component
      sequence - the value for the sequence record component
      qualities - the value for the qualities record component
      flags - the value for the flags record component
      mateChromosome - the value for the mateChromosome record component
      matePosition - the value for the matePosition record component
      templateLength - the value for the templateLength record component

  • Method Details

    • isMapped

      public boolean isMapped()
      SAM flag 0x4: read failed to map.

    • isPaired

      public boolean isPaired()
      SAM flag 0x1: read is part of a pair.

    • isReverse

      public boolean isReverse()
      SAM flag 0x10: read is reverse-complemented relative to reference.

    • isSecondary

      public boolean isSecondary()
      SAM flag 0x100: secondary alignment (multi-mapping).

    • isSupplementary

      public boolean isSupplementary()
      SAM flag 0x800: supplementary alignment (chimeric).

    • readLength

      public int readLength()
      Read length in bases (length of sequence).

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
